entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: The country where the land restoration workshop and FMNR initiatives are focused.

entities.name: NIAMEY
entities.description: The city in Niger where the national workshop was held.

entities.name: FARMER MANAGED NATURAL REGENERATION
entities.description: A land restoration approach focused on the sustainable management of indigenous trees and shrubs to restore degraded landscapes.

entities.name: LAND RESTORATION
entities.description: The process of recovering ecological functions and productivity of degraded land.

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The capacity to maintain and continue the benefits of land restoration efforts over time.

entities.name: SCALING
entities.description: The process of expanding the application and impact of FMNR across larger areas.

entities.name: MONITORING
entities.description: The systematic collection of data to track the progress and effectiveness of restoration initiatives.

entities.name: COORDINATED IMPLEMENTATION
entities.description: The collaborative execution of land restoration activities among various stakeholders.
